viewport.description: Default size of the rendering window. This will define the size of your image when using fullpage. Format in {width}x{height} (in pixels).

transparent.description:
If set to true, the image will have a transparent background.
**Note**: This option is only available when outputting PNG images.

fullpage.description:
Capture the full scrollable page.
Only one of `fullpage`, `css_selector`, or `clip` can be set.

css_selector.description:
CSS selector for the element to capture.
Only one of `fullpage`, `css_selector`, or `clip` can be set.

clip.description:
Clip region to capture.
Only one of `fullpage`, `css_selector`, or `clip` can be set.

width.description: Width of the region to capture (in pixels).

height.description: Height of the region to capture (in pixels).

x.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner (in pixels).

y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner (in pixels).

quality.description: Quality of the output image (only for JPEG, 10-100).

dpi.description: DPI scaling factor. Must be one of 1, 2, or 4.
